## Validation

- [ ] Formatting, secret scan, lint, and strict types pass.
- [ ] Unit, interaction, and property tests pass.
- [ ] Relevant database, browser, accessibility, performance, and load checks pass.
- [ ] Production and portable builds pass when affected.
- [ ] Documentation and migration evidence are current.
